title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for downloading and running Llama 2, Code Llama, and other large language models locally on macOS and Linux.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, and delete models with a simple API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LangChain LLMs and embedders for RAG, agents, and chains.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, list, and delete models from JVM applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API; chat, generate, and manage models in Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight Rust CLI for chatting with Ollama models from the terminal with history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as a GitHub-Copilot-like autocomplete and chat assistant.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor, and chat with code using any Ollama model via simple commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector, PVC, and service exposure.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-run Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, and Open-WebUI with NVIDIA runtime.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot server that answers channel mentions using any Ollama model via Bolt.js.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that chats in servers using Ollama models with slash commands and conversation memory.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app exposing Ollama models via REST endpoints with API key auth and admin panel.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI that talks to Ollama with session memory, model picker, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# .NET client for Ollama with async generate/chat and streaming support.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community-maintained Go client for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, and list models from Go programs.
